_comment: Update this when each Finals game ends. cross_venue.py reads at 15:00 ET. Format: [home_wins, away_wins] from THE NEXT GAME perspective. NBA: G2 at SA, NY won 105-104. Series 1-1. G3 at NY → NY home, both with 1 win → nba: [1, 1]. NHL: G1 at CAR (VGK won 5-4), G2 at CAR (CAR won 4-3 OT). Series 1-1. G3 at VGK → VGK home, both with 1 win → nhl: [1, 1].
